content: Regenerate self signed SSL certificate  Table of contents When first installed a self-signed ssl certificate is automatically generated and used to secure Mission Portal and API communications. You can regenerate this certificate by running cfe_enterprise_selfsigned_cert bundle with the _cfe_enterprise_selfsigned_cert_regenerate_cert class defined. This can be done by running the following commands as root on the hub. command cf-agent --no-lock --inform \ --bundlesequence cfe_enterprise_selfsigned_cert \ --define _cfe_enterprise_selfsigned_cert_regenerate_certificate
title: Regenerate self signed SSL certificate
